original_image_tags: Top portion of a manila file folder tab, aged and yellowed, with multiple labels and handwritten annotations.
The main body of the page is a blank, aged manila file folder front. At the bottom, there are two standard hole-punch circles.

elements.description: Yellowed document folder back with a curved top edge. At the top, several pieces of aged tape secure overlapping handwritten and stamped annotations. Visible handwritten text includes numbers '62-63 894-781' and the name 'Massburg'. A stamped label reads 'RECORDED JUN 25 1952'. Another stamped text reads 'INDEXED-101'. The folder has three punched holes (one at the top curve, two at the bottom) and a small brown stain near the bottom left hole.
